title: Chisel
description: Adds a Chisel that replaces the targeted block with the one in your off-hand
body:
# Chisel

Lightweight utility mod that adds a new tool for builders

![Crafting Recipes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pseja/chisel/refs/heads/main/images/crafting.gif)

## Features
When you right-click a block with the Chisel, it instantly replaces that block with the one you’re holding in your off-hand

![Demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pseja/chisel/refs/heads/main/images/demo.gif)

## Requirements
- Minecraft: 1.21+
- Fabric Loader: 0.17.2 or newer

## Contributing
Issues, pull requests and translations are welcome
